title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CaratLane - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CaratLane - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, CaratLane in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About CaratLane:
CaratLane is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CaratLane!
